name: alterlab-qiime2-amplicon
description: Runs 16S/ITS amplicon (microbiome) analysis with the QIIME 2 amplicon distribution (2026.1; renamed to "qiime2" in 2026.4) in the correct order: manifest import, cutadapt trim-paired primer removal BEFORE dada2 denoise-paired (trunc-len chosen from the demux quality .qzv), feature-classifier classify-sklearn against a version-matched SILVA 138 or Greengenes2 classifier, and diversity core-metrics-phylogenetic — teaching the .qza/.qzv artifact-and-provenance model and the 2026.1 feature-table sum
author: AlterLab-IEU
